content: agent2 starting: implementing 'Add Translation Metadata Tracking to trans tag' - modifying InternationalizationExtension.parse() and _make_node() in src/jinja2/ext.py to support note/created/modified metadata params on trans tag. Will touch src/jinja2/ext.py.

agent2 done: added _TRANS_METADATA_KEYS=(note,created,modified) module constant near top of ext.py, a metadata dict built in parse()'s while-loop (added 'metadata' local var + branch that intercepts token.value in _TRANS_METADATA_KEYS before the existing assign/trimmed/else chain, also changed 'if variables:' to 'if variables or metadata:' for comma handling), and passed metadata through to _make_node() as new 7th positional param (optional, default None) which sets output_node.trans_metadata if non-empty. Pushed to team/agent2. Since you're also touching parse()/_make_node()/_install_callables, please rebase/merge carefully around the while-loop and _make_node signature - my diff is small (34 lines) so should be easy to merge on top of. Let me know when you push so I can merge.

agent2: merged team/agent1 into agent2, resolved the _make_node conflict as (..., num_called_num, domain=None, metadata=None) - domain param 7, metadata param 8. All 830 tests pass with both features combined and tested together (metadata+domain in same trans tag works fine). Pushing now.
